pre_impl_questions.question: Does src/clauded/roles/ contain exactly 25 bare dirs?
pre_impl_questions.answer: Yes — verified by ls and wheel inspection: aws_cli, c, claude_code, codex, common, dart, docker, gh, go, gradle, java, kotlin, maven, mongodb, mysql, node, opencode, playwright, poetry, postgresql, python, redis, rust, sqlite, uv.

pre_impl_questions.question: Are _apply_distro_suffix and _ROLES_WITH_VARIANTS removed from provisioner.py?
pre_impl_questions.answer: Yes — both removed. run() calls _get_base_roles() directly and passes bare names to _generate_playbook() and _validate_roles_exist().

pre_impl_questions.question: Does the wheel build include exactly the 25 bare role dirs?
pre_impl_questions.answer: Yes — uv build + wheel inspection confirmed 25 dirs, no -alpine or -ubuntu suffixes.

post_impl_questions.question: Do all tooling gates pass?
post_impl_questions.answer: Yes — lint, format, typecheck all pass. 1005 passed, 1 skipped, 0 failed.

post_impl_questions.question: Were all 4 Story 04 skip markers honored?
post_impl_questions.answer: Yes — test_opencode_alpine_raises, test_applies_alpine_suffix_to_variant_roles, test_all_real_roles_get_suffix, test_play_includes_roles all deleted. TestProvisionerApplyDistroSuffix class deleted entirely.
